biography_short: Rey asturiano que amplió considerablemente el territorio del reino y organizó su estructura política; casado con Ermesinda, hija de Pelayo.

visual_profile.clothing: military cloak and princely mantle; symbolic insignia of rulership
visual_profile.style_notes: combines warrior imagery with nascent royal administration; portraits should emphasize command and organization.

must_keep: Expanded the Asturian domain (Galicia to Vizcaya) and implemented territorial/administrative measures
must_avoid: Presenting exact administrative reforms with modern institutional terms without source backing

emotional_state.trigger_summary: Opportunities opened by divisions among Muslim rulers; push to expand and organize territory.

arc_state.external_goal: consolidate and expand the Asturian realm
arc_state.internal_need: transform military successes into durable governance
arc_state.contradiction: need for expansion vs. limited resources and resistance from local nobles
arc_state.change_vector: from frontier leader to territorial organizer
